new_value: Added ToolCallRef, extended ConversationMessage with ToolCalls, added HistoryDelta to TurnResult, added TurnExecutionError with PartialTurnResult helper, added ToolCallToRef converter. 8 tests pass, full build clean.

RunAgenticLoop now accumulates HistoryDelta: assistant tool-call messages with ToolCallRef, tool result messages, and final assistant text. LLM errors mid-loop return TurnExecutionError with partial history. Propagated through LLMResponse→ProviderResult→TurnResult. 4 new tests + all existing tests pass.

Created history_sanitize.go with SanitizeConversationHistory: drops orphan tool results, drops empty messages, collapses consecutive same-role text, synthesizes error results for trailing unmatched tool calls. Wired into buildLLMMessagesFromTurn with ToolCallRef→ToolCall conversion. 13 tests pass.

Wired tool history into context engine and persistence: (1) Extended context engine Message with ToolCalls field, (2) Added 'tool' as valid transcript role, (3) Added persistAndIngestTurnHistory helper with deterministic entry IDs, (4) DM path: persists HistoryDelta, replaced assistant-only ingestion, extracts partial results on error, (5) Channel path: same treatment for both success and error paths, (6) Both context engine assembly paths now convert ToolCalls. Full build clean, all tests pass.

All 4 phases complete: (1) Extended runtime history model with ToolCallRef, HistoryDelta, TurnExecutionError. (2) Agentic loop accumulates structured HistoryDelta with partial-result propagation on errors. (3) History sanitization drops orphan tool results, repairs trailing unmatched calls, collapses consecutive messages. (4) Full wiring into context engine and persistence for both DM and channel paths with error-path partial result extraction. 25 new tests, full build clean.

{"id":"swarmstr-b7e.7","title":"Silent turn hang: embed() blocks DM goroutine without context cancellation","description":"    Imported from live NIP-34 issue event.

    Source metadata:
    - repo_addr: 30617:cdee943cbb19c51ab847a66d5d774373aa9f63d287246bb59b0827fa5e637400:swarmstr
    - event_id: d1202c852e2451a393c3fc3c1547a9ea2e73431df3a3a4c397baebea05416ea1
    - author_pubkey: 14907326f89ebdfc9cfdabe17bd492aa48abbd59ad5d8cc25295760bdf0e5015
    - created_at: 2026-03-29 02:36:18 UTC
    - pulled_status: open
    - status_event_id: 

    Original issue body:

    ## Summary

DM sessions silently stop responding. `last_inbound_at` updates but `last_reply_at` never advances. `active_turn` is always null. Restart clears it.

## Root Cause

`dmRunAgentTurn` runs synchronously in the DM worker goroutine. Before the 180s per-turn timeout context is created, two blocking embed calls run with no context cancellation:

1. `persistMemories()` → `QdrantBackend.Add()` → `embed()`
2. `assembleSessionMemoryContext()` → `Search()` → `embed()`

`QdrantBackend.embed()` (internal/memory/qdrant.go:72) uses `http.Client{Timeout: 30s}` with no context parameter. If Ollama is slow, (N docs + 1 search) x 30s blocks the goroutine — the 180s turn timeout never fires because it is created *after* these calls.

`active_turn` is never set anywhere in the codebase — always null, making diagnosis impossible.

## Fix

1. Add context to `embed(ctx, text)` — use `NewRequestWithContext`
2. Create turn timeout context *before* `persistMemories` and `assembleSessionMemoryContext`
3. Run `persistMemories` in a goroutine (not on critical reply path)
4. Set `active_turn = true` on slot acquire, `false` on release
","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"chebizarro@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T02:59:27Z","created_by":"Biz","updated_at":"2026-03-29T02:59:27Z","external_ref":"nip34:d1202c852e2451a393c3fc3c1547a9ea2e73431df3a3a4c397baebea05416ea1"}

new_value: {"notes":"Started implementation on 2026-03-28: moved per-turn timeout creation ahead of memory embedding/search in dmRunAgentTurn; made user/assistant memory persistence asynchronous; added context-aware Qdrant embed/search plumbing (including HybridIndex passthrough) so cancellation/timeouts reach Ollama embedding calls; wired session metadata active_turn true/false around DM turn execution; normalized Qdrant delete IDs; serialized Index.Save temp-file writes to avoid async save races. Validation: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/memory/..."}

    Original issue body:

    ## Summary

DM sessions silently stop responding. `last_inbound_at` updates but `last_reply_at` never advances. `active_turn` is always null. Restart clears it.

## Root Cause

`dmRunAgentTurn` runs synchronously in the DM worker goroutine. Before the 180s per-turn timeout context is created, two blocking embed calls run with no context cancellation:

1. `persistMemories()` → `QdrantBackend.Add()` → `embed()`
2. `assembleSessionMemoryContext()` → `Search()` → `embed()`

`QdrantBackend.embed()` (internal/memory/qdrant.go:72) uses `http.Client{Timeout: 30s}` with no context parameter. If Ollama is slow, (N docs + 1 search) x 30s blocks the goroutine — the 180s turn timeout never fires because it is created *after* these calls.
